title: Countries supported by Stripe Tax
excerpt: Stripe can calculate tax on sales in the locations listed in the table below. Select a location to learn more about: - When to register for tax collection on your sales - How to register to collect tax and links to the relevant tax authority You can also learn about tax calculation and collection in each region: - [Africa](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/supported-countries/africa.md) - [Asia Pacific](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/supported-countries/asia-pacific.md)
